session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report whether all checks pass or any failures. Report exit code and a summary. Do NOT fix anything.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci checks from root directory

session.assistant:
**Success: All checks passed**
Exit code: 0
Summary of all checks: - Lint: All checks passed - Format Check: 1741 files already formatted - Prettier Check: All matched files use Prettier code style - Markdown Check: Passed - Exec Reference Check: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date - Type Check (ty): All checks passed - Unit Tests (erk): 5936 passed - Unit Tests (erk-dev): 138 passed - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed - Unit Tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - Violations: 0
All CI checks completed successfully with no failures.
